crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update heartbeat, check inbox, work on highest-priority proposal.

crons.name: weekly-review
crons.prompt: Run: cortextos bus token-audit recommend --since 7d. Review each generated proposal. For each: read .claude/skills/token-audit/SKILL.md section 'Recommendations'. Attach an executive summary, then post the top-3 summary to the activity channel + notify the user via Telegram. Write proposals to ~/.cortextos/$CTX_INSTANCE_ID/orgs/$CTX_ORG/analytics/reports/token-audit/recommendations/. Then route each via the approvals skill.

crons.name: outcome-measurement
crons.prompt: Run: cortextos bus token-audit list-recommendations --state applied --format json. For each: compare post-apply window to expected_savings_usd_per_week. If hypothesis_held=false, file a revert proposal. Update each recommendation's state to 'measured' then 'kept' or 'reverted'.
